core_mechanism: a hybrid Lagrangian-Eulerian material-point discretization that carries the deforming continuum's state on moving material points while resolving forces and contact interactions on a fixed background grid, enabling stable large-deformation continuum evolution with complex boundary contact
brief_reason: The abstract states the method is a hybrid material point method (hybrid-MPM) integrating a Lagrangian finite-element description with an Eulerian finite-difference grid to simulate large deformation involving complex contact.
